Primary_Regulatory_Targets.reason: NAD7 is explicitly identified as specifically affected.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: Continuous illumination growth applies, and SOM42 overexpressors were directly included in pathogen HR/resistance assays.

Protein_Complex_Involvement.reason: SOM42 indirectly affects mitochondrial complex I through NAD7 maturation.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: This application statement is inferential and not directly tested.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: The paper shows complex I deficiency and SOM42-overexpressing plants have attenuated HR and increased bacterial susceptibility.

Other_Important_Info.reason: This accurately summarizes SOM42 as a post-transcriptional regulator rather than a transcription factor.
